text:
Created attachment 193393
patch to update the port

- update 2.13 -> 2.19
Changes: http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/DROLSKY/DateTime-TimeZone-2.19/Changes
- fix *_DEPENDS
- adopt mainainership after 5-month-long maintainer timeout.
- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180511 at 11.1-release-amd64 with perl 5.26.2 runs ok.
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail say: "PASS".
